What an incredible experience hosting the entire Mumbai Acrobatic Gymnastics team at PowerJump Sports, Pune! 🙌

From learning new skills on the safety belt to pushing boundaries with confidence, every athlete brought energy, discipline, and passion onto the floor. As a coach, it was truly rewarding to guide and work closely with each one of them watching growth happen in real time.

Beyond training, it was all about connection, learning, and enjoying the journey together. We had an amazing time hosting such a talented and driven group.

Thank you for trusting and choosing PowerJump Sports. 

Respect & Gratitude to the Mentors Behind the Athletes @snavn_acro_gymnastics 

Wishing all of you the very best for the upcoming National Championships go out there and give it your all! 🇮🇳🔥

#PowerJumpSports #AcrobaticGymnastics #GymnasticsTraining #PuneFitness #SkillDevelopment GymnastLife CoachesLife AthleteMindset

Why hit the gym when you can hit the court? 🏓💥

Still running on a treadmill staring at a wall?
Still counting reps in a boring gym?

Let the numbers do the talking 👇

📊 Calorie Burn Comparison:
🏓 Pickleball — 400-600 cal/hr
🏃 Running — ~500 cal/hr
🏋️ Gym (avg) — ~300 cal/hr
✨ Fun Factor — UNLIMITED

Pickleball is a full-body workout disguised as the best
time of your life. 🔥

You get cardio, agility, reflexes, and core strength — all
while laughing with friends on the court. That’s a deal
no gym membership can beat. 💪
